description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof design with a prominent cylindrical structure on one side, possibly serving as a skylight or architectural accent. The exterior walls are finished in a dark gray color, contrasted by large white-framed windows that allow ample natural light into the living spaces. The front includes a driveway leading to an integrated garage, while the rear showcases a spacious patio area with a mix of tiled and green surfaces, as well as a circular pool or water feature. The layout is open and sprawling, with multiple interconnected rooms and a clear separation between living and utility spaces. The presence of a car in the driveway and outdoor furniture on the patio suggests a residential, family-oriented environment. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with dark gray walls, large white-framed windows, a cylindrical architectural feature, and an integrated garage. The design includes a spacious patio, driveway, and open-plan layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and the cylindrical feature above the living area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, garage, and the rear patio with green and tiled surfaces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio, circular pool or water feature, and the cylindrical architectural element.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the driveway, garage, and the full extent of the patio and backyard area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
